_provenance.note: Golden snapshot of the litvar-link CLI scripting contract captured against the ORIGINAL argparse implementation (P3<3.6) BEFORE the typer migration. It pins the STABLE contract (command names, per-command flags, serve sub-commands, exit codes) and intentionally NOT byte-for-byte --help text, which differs between the argparse and typer help renderers. The typer migration (3.6.2) must reproduce this contract.
_provenance.source: argparse main() in litvar_link/cli.py prior to typer rewrite
